# Minette van den Heever

> Online CV and portfolio of Minette van den Heever — Education Leader at Genius Premium Tuition, Cape Town, South Africa. Former medical student at the University of the Witwatersrand, Johannesburg. Experienced tutor of Mathematics, Science, Biology, Chemistry, Physics and Afrikaans.

Minette van den Heever is a South African professional based in Cape Town. She holds the role of Education Leader at Genius Premium Tuition (March 2025 – present, Cape Town; previously Johannesburg). She studied MBBCh (Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery) at the University of the Witwatersrand from 2021 to 2025. She is a qualified level 3 first aider, an artist, and a Voortrekker.

## Pages

- [Home](https://minette.pretoriusse.net/): Full online CV — about Minette, her skills, education and experience timeline, hobbies and contact details.
- [About Me](https://minette.pretoriusse.net/about-me/): Personal background, values and goals.
- [My Skills](https://minette.pretoriusse.net/my-skills/): First Aid (level 3), Microsoft Word, Microsoft Excel, Microsoft Access, Notepad++.
- [Education & Experience](https://minette.pretoriusse.net/education-experience-1/): Full timeline from Laerskool Fairland (2008) through Helpmekaar Kollege matric (2020, 8 IEB distinctions), Wits MBBCh (2021–2025), tutoring (2021–2025) and Education Leader at Genius Premium Tuition (2025–present).
- [Hobbies](https://minette.pretoriusse.net/hobbies/): Netball (Wits University), Art (painting and drawing), Voortrekkers.
- [Contact](https://minette.pretoriusse.net/contact/): Contact form and social links.

## Experience entries

- [Laerskool Fairland](https://minette.pretoriusse.net/education-experience-1/laerskool-fairland/): Primary school, Johannesburg, 2008–2015.
- [SPCA Voluntary Work](https://minette.pretoriusse.net/education-experience-1/spca-voluntary-work/): Randburg SPCA, August 2019.
- [Helpmekaar Kollege](https://minette.pretoriusse.net/education-experience-1/helpmekaar-kollege/): Highschool matriculate, Johannesburg, 2016–2020. IEB, 8 distinctions.
- [Admin / Finances](https://minette.pretoriusse.net/education-experience-1/admin-finances/): SG Freight, Johannesburg, December 2020.
- [University Student](https://minette.pretoriusse.net/education-experience-1/wits-student/): MBBCh, University of the Witwatersrand, Johannesburg, 2021–2025.
- [Waiter](https://minette.pretoriusse.net/education-experience-1/waiter/): Keg and Filley's, Johannesburg, May–August 2021.
- [Tutoring](https://minette.pretoriusse.net/education-experience-1/tutoring/): Private tutoring and Genius Premium Tuition, Johannesburg, 2021–2025.
- [Education Leader (Johannesburg)](https://minette.pretoriusse.net/education-experience-1/): Genius Premium Tuition, Johannesburg, March 2025–November 2025.
- [Education Leader (Cape Town)](https://www.geniuspremiumtuition.com/staff_profiles/minette-van-den-heever): Genius Premium Tuition, Cape Town, November 2025–present.

## Skills

- [First Aid](https://minette.pretoriusse.net/my-skills/first-aid/): Level 3 qualified first aider.
- [Microsoft Word](https://minette.pretoriusse.net/my-skills/microsoft-word/): Forms, documents, emails and questionnaires.
- [Microsoft Excel](https://minette.pretoriusse.net/my-skills/microsoft-excel/): Data analysis, visualisation, graphs and automation.
- [Microsoft Access](https://minette.pretoriusse.net/my-skills/microsoft-access/): Database creation and analysis.
- [Notepad++](https://minette.pretoriusse.net/my-skills/notepad-plus-plus/): Entry-level web page creation.

## Hobbies

- [Netball](https://minette.pretoriusse.net/hobbies/netball/): Played for Wits University.
- [Art](https://minette.pretoriusse.net/hobbies/art/): Painting and drawing.
- [Voortrekkers](https://minette.pretoriusse.net/hobbies/voortrekkers/): Camping, survival skills, community.
